_comment: Lidless is a single hub repo (lidless-site / lidless.dev), not a fleet of subdomains. This kit syncs the 12 tool versions into that one site. Each entry under `tools` maps a tool slug (matching src/lib/tools.ts) to its GitHub repo and version source. source types: gh-release (latest GitHub release tag, the v prefix is inferred from the current value), manual (never auto-touched, used for a tool with no release yet). The synced versions feed the VERSIONS map in src/lib/tools.ts; SITE.version in src/lib/site.ts stays manual ('Wave 1', the hub's own marketing label). The MCP tools live under the lidless-labs org; watchtower and the hub site itself remain under solomonneas.
